name: io.github.labelgrid/labelgrid-mcp
description: Official LabelGrid MCP server — connect your AI client to your LabelGrid account to manage catalog, releases, files, analytics, accounting, webhooks and distribution.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_API_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Your LabelGrid API token. Create one in your dashboard under Profile → API Tokens. Without it the server starts in setup mode and walks you through creating one.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_API_URL
environment_variables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to the production API.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_ENABLE_WRITES
environment_variables.description: Enable safe writes (create/update drafts, labels, artists, and similar). Enabled by default; set to false for read-only.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_ENABLE_FULL_WRITES
environment_variables.description: Enable full writes (distribution, takedowns, immutable uploads). Disabled by default; also requires LABELGRID_FULL_WRITES_ACK.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_FULL_WRITES_ACK
environment_variables.description: Must equal the exact acknowledgment sentence (see the README safety section) to arm full writes.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_TOOLSETS
environment_variables.description: Comma-separated subset of toolsets to expose (identity, reference, catalog, releases, review, analytics, accounting, delivery, webhooks, distribution). Defaults to all.

environment_variables.name: LABELGRID_READ_ONLY
environment_variables.description: Force reads only; overrides both write flags. Defaults to false.
